# Pixelette Technologies

> Enterprise AI, blockchain, and custom software development company in the UK and USA. APPG AI Secretariat; ISO 9001 & ISO 27001 certified; 200+ products shipped across 13 countries.

## Services

- [AI Development Services](https://pixelettetech.com/ai-development-services)
- [Blockchain Development Services](https://pixelettetech.com/blockchain-development-services)
- [Custom Software Development Services](https://pixelettetech.com/custom-software-development-services)
- [AR/VR Development Services](https://pixelettetech.com/ar-vr-development-services)
- [Web Development Services](https://pixelettetech.com/web-development-services)
- [Mobile App Development Services](https://pixelettetech.com/mobile-app-development-services)
- [UI/UX Design Services](https://pixelettetech.com/ui-ux-design-services)
- [Quantum Development Services](https://pixelettetech.com/quantum-development-services)

## Engagement models

- [Dedicated Team Services](https://pixelettetech.com/dedicated-team-services)
- [IT Outsourcing Services](https://pixelettetech.com/it-outsourcing-services)
- [Staff Augmentation Services](https://pixelettetech.com/staff-augmentation-services)
